old_string: - Check your prediction accuracy (the `accuracy` field) — is it improving?
new_string:
- Check your prediction accuracy (the `accuracy` field) — is it improving?
- **CRITICAL: When reporting RL2F accuracy in working memory or messages, ALWAYS use the API value from `curl -sf http://localhost:8100/reasoning/accuracy`. Do NOT self-compute from the chains visible in your context — your sample is biased and consistently wrong (3 consecutive misreports in March 2026).**
reason: Orchestrator self-computed RL2F accuracy 3 consecutive cycles (30%, 35%, wrong values) instead of using API (actual: 52%). Adding explicit instruction to use API endpoint prevents systemic misreporting.
review_notes: Superseded: identical fix already exists at line 87 of heartbeat.md (added via direct edit). Patch redundant.
